page_content:
HIST399 Honors Thesis Senior Seminar (1 Credit)

Senior seminar with honors director. Focus on preparation of thesis. Prerequisite: HIST395 and HIST396.

Corequisite: HIST398.

Restriction: Must be in the History Honors program.

Repeatable to: 2 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: This course must be taken twice to meet the requirements for the honors program in history.
